name: Marco Rubio
subject: We May Lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter, if we hand the conservative movement over to Donald Trump by making him the Republican nominee, we will lose. | [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34101823:WpBtaHCNA:m:1:1155937413:5556F9E70E91AF3EB606AF7E1E2B8D0F:r)
---
Peter,

There's no other way to say this: we will lose.

If we hand the conservative movement over to Donald Trump by making him the Republican nominee, we will lose.

It will be the most devastating setback to our cause in two generations -- and once that happens we may never have time to correct the course our country is on today.

**A new poll out shows that if Donald Trump becomes our nominee, he will lose to Hillary Clinton by 13 points, the most catastrophic electoral landslide in decades.**

It will be a total repudiation of the conservative agenda by the American people. We will lose all of the gains we have made since the Reagan Revolution.

Whatever issue is the most important to you -- the Second Amendment, the dignity of life, traditional values, economic mobility, a strong military, freedom from government overreach -- it's all on the line.

And if Donald Trump were to win Florida next week, he takes a huge step toward being our nominee, and the disaster that will follow. But it doesn't have to be that way.

If you help me win in Florida, I will be our party's nominee, I will unite our conservative movement, and I will win in November.

**[There's still time for you to chip in and fund our victory in Florida -- and this is my promise to you: every dollar you donate by clicking right here goes straight to Florida TODAY.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34101823:WpBtaHCNA:m:1:1155937413:5556F9E70E91AF3EB606AF7E1E2B8D0F:r)**

Let's earn this!

Marco

body:
Dear Friend,

It is clear this is
now a two-man race, and last night at the Republican debate we
saw a stark contrast between a consistent, proven conservative
and a self-proclaimed deal-maker who has been part of the
corruption in Washington for 40 years.

Ted Cruz pledged to
continue to fight against the Washington Cartel; Donald Trump
bragged about his decades-long support of the Cartel.

Ted Cruz laid out a
detailed plan to end sanctuary cities; Donald Trump explained how
he games the H-1B system to benefit his businesses.

Ted Cruz displayed
readiness to lead as Commander in Chief and an in-depth
understanding of the national security threats facing our nation;
Donald Trump defended his "neutral" position on Israel.

If you are a
conservative, a Republican, or an American concerned about our
children's future -- if you don't believe Donald Trump is the
right person to defeat Hillary Clinton in November, stand with
us. Stand with Carly Fiorina, Mark Levin, Mike Lee, and thousands
upon thousands of Courageous Conservatives across America who
have joined our campaign, and together, we'll take this country
back!

Best,

Alice Stewart

name: Rand Paul
subject: Need your support now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot,

A win for me in November is a win for the
country. Let me tell you why:
President Obama thinks he has the chance to
cement liberal control of the U.S. Supreme Court for decades --
and only a Republican Senate can stop him.

HELP ME STOP HIM NOW
>>

If Democrats win the Senate and lose the
White House in November, they have the option to change the
entire path of our nation by forcing through a liberal
replacement to Justice Scalia's seat.
That's because a new Congress begins January
3rd, 2017, and President Obama will be still in Office until
January 20, 2017.
That means they have two weeks for the
President to send a nominee and with a Democrat majority, the
Senate could apply the 'nuclear option' and vote in the nominee
with only 51 votes.
This would be a complete nightmare. I need
your support now to make sure it doesn't happen.
I cannot stress this enough: losing the
Senate in November is not an option.
I do not believe a GOP majority should
confirm a Supreme Court nomination from President Obama and this
has made it more clear than ever that the role of the Senate is
vital to maintaining liberty.
Patriot, I need your help to win another
term, to stand up for common sense in Washington.
Without a strong Senate, we cannot ensure
that our courts do their to uphold the Constitution. We cannot
ensure our country does not fall so far into debt that we cannot
recover.
That's why I am more committed to another
term for Kentucky and for this country.
Please stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

>>

amount >>

subject: Help my friend

body:
I've stood shoulder to shoulder with my friend Ted Cruz as he's battled the Washington elites, and now, I'm proud to endorse him for president. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34103579:sXLJtHCSN:m:1:1104269936:8CA5A34D12929E9039FAAFD0990A268C:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34103579:sXLJtHCSN:m:1:1104269936:8CA5A34D12929E9039FAAFD0990A268C:r) **_FROM THE DESK OF_**
**SEN. MIKE LEE**
---
Friend,

_I've stood shoulder to shoulder with my friend Ted Cruz as he's battled the Washington elites, and now, I'm proud to endorse him for president._

**But that's not enough...we all need to unite behind Ted Cruz.**

Ted needs our support -- both in prayer and financially before Super Tuesday in just four days!

[**Can you, Friend, click this special link and make a donation of $3 or more?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34103579:sXLJtHCSN:m:1:1104269936:8CA5A34D12929E9039FAAFD0990A268C:r)****

You see: there is a big difference between platitudes and a plan, there is a difference between slogans and substance, and there is an even bigger difference between Donald Trump and my friend, Ted Cruz.

**No one has a track record like Senator Cruz of challenging the establishment and refusing to give in to their demands.**

Ted stands for us.

But uniting the Republican party behind Ted Cruz and defeating Donald Trump is going to take muscle.

[**So I'm personally asking: will you make a contribution to Ted's campaign -- $3 or $35 -- when he needs us most?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34103579:sXLJtHCSN:m:1:1104269936:8CA5A34D12929E9039FAAFD0990A268C:r)

There is no better leader to represent us in the fight against the Washington elites than Ted Cruz.

If you make a contribution now, I'll be sure to show Ted that you've stepped up to help, and I am certain he will be extremely grateful.

For freedom,

Sen. Mike Lee

[ DONATE ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34103580:sXLJtHCSN:m:1:1104269936:8CA5A34D12929E9039FAAFD0990A268C:r)

P.S. If you've been supporting Ted from the beginning or if you've been sitting on the fence, [**will you please take action now -- before it's too late -- and make an urgent gift to Ted's campaign?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34103579:sXLJtHCSN:m:1:1104269936:8CA5A34D12929E9039FAAFD0990A268C:r) Even $3 will be a huge help. Thanks! -Mike

subject: why I fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46577733:JdtgiOrKN:m:1:1349778030:FBCBD7568F398D390DBC87C371F99865:r)
---
| | | | Peter, At Thursday's debate, I talked a little about what keeps me going in this race, and I want to tell you a little more about that. I know I'm an underdog now, but we're also the only campaign that can beat Donald Trump in Florida and take the state's 99 delegates, win the nomination, and change the direction of our country this fall. And what exactly is it that keeps me fighting day to day? It's stories like one my wife mentioned to me this week. She heard about a gentleman in South Florida who recently got out of surgery and whose doctors told him he needs to be at home resting. Yet every afternoon, he takes his little aluminum chair out to an early voting location in his community to hold a sign that says "Marco Rubio." The media and the establishment are furiously trying to write me off, but **that gentleman and other supporters like him haven 't given up on me, and I'm not going to give up on them.** He represents my parents' generation and everything they did for me, and for all of us: They worked so hard to leave us the greatest country on earth, a country where anyone can be anything. One of my favorite Bible verses is Luke 12:48: From those to whom much has been given, much is expected. Peter, our generation has been given a lot -- by our parents, our grandparents, and by everyone who has made America what it is. Now, we're expected to do our part, and that's what I'm trying to do in this election. I want us to do our part to make sure that we don't elect to the presidency a divisive reality TV star with no ideas for our future, a socialist, or a corrupt politician from yesterday. America certainly deserves that from us. Every day in Florida, I hear from committed supporters like this man in South Florida with the aluminum chair, who are doing their part to make sure we get this election right. [**Will you do your part, and make a donation of whatever you can afford right now to our Florida Victory Fund?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46577733:JdtgiOrKN:m:1:1349778030:FBCBD7568F398D390DBC87C371F99865:r) Sincerely, Marco Rubio

subject: 10 for 10
body:

---

Peter, May I ask you to send $10 - a dollar for each of the below 10 reasons to support Joe Sestak to serve us in the U.S. Senate: 1\. _Integrity_ _of service._ Joe turned down lucrative lobbying jobs after he left Congress, in order to teach our youth and serve in disaster relief and foreign policy areas. 2\. _Our country 's security._ We live in an increasingly dangerous world, and the Admiral has the national security experience we need to make wise national security decisions. 3\. _Joe will walk in your shoes._ Joe walked **422 miles across PA to hear people 's hopes and concerns** because he wants to serve them - as he did for the 18,000 constituents who walked through his district door for help while in Congress (four times the average congressional office.) | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719596/3476a20e/c6bf348/274548dd/368802144/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0311FBb1&amounts=10,20,50,100,200,500,1000")
---
4\. _Your contribution really will matter._ **99 percent of our campaign contributions come from people like _you_** - not PACs.
5\. _A warrior that wins._ Joe **defeated a 10-term GOP congressman by 12% in a GOP district,** was**re-elected by 20% (with no ads),** and **beat****30 year****incumbent Senator Arlen Specter by 8%.**
6\. _Nobody will work harder._ Even our primary opponent's campaign chair admits **" Anyone who thinks Joe Sestak will be easy to beat in a primary is crazy."**
7\. _We 're spending your money wisely._ **The most recent poll shows us ahead of our closest primary opponent by 16 points!**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719596/3476a20e/c6bf348/274548dc/368802144/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0311FBb2&amounts=10,20,50,100,200,500,1000")
---
8\. _It 's more than style, it's substance._ **Joe released a 250-page policy book, an 11-part Plan for Working Families, and a 36-page national security strategy** - all available on our website.
9\. _Joe has heft and depth._ Joe was an **Admiral, a Congressman, a Professor, and holds a Ph.D. from Harvard** - what other candidate brings his credentials to the Senate, and uses them best to serve people?
10\. _We 're in a fight and we need you._ **This Senate primary is the most competitive in the country** and every dollar really will count. Joe is counting on you.
_**_Help send Joe to the Senate - click the button below._**_

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Hillary Clinton's distortions
body:
#
I think it's very important that you read what _The Washington Post_ wrote yesterday about Hillary Clinton's distortions:
> _"But it's striking that, as Clinton has doubled down on the attacks, she has with some regularity played pretty fast and loose with the facts._
> _"She'll take a vote Sanders has made during his25 years in Congress and gloss over most, if not all, of the details about it. The result is a carefully worded insinuation or even outright accusation that Sanders has voted against his base on everything from immigration to the auto bailout to fossil fuels."_
All this week in the press and Wednesday night on the debate stage, Bernie has had to defend himself against mud-slinging and distortions about his record and our campaign. That doesn't even count the super PACs funded by Wall Street and a billionaire class determined to see us lose.
Bernie's running a positive campaign. He doesn't have a super PAC. **We are only doing so well because our supporters have contributed more than 5 million times to help Bernie win.**
[**So I need to ask you directly one more time: please make a $3 contribution to our campaign now to help Bernie defend against our opponent's attacks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/clinton-distortions?refcode=em160311-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/clinton-distortions?refcode=em160311-full")
Five big states will vote on Tuesday - Florida, Illinois, Missouri, North Carolina, and Ohio. We're doing everything we can to correct the record about the attacks on Bernie and turn out the millions of voters we need to win.
Your contribution will be so important for Bernie doing well on Tuesday. We'll put it to use immediately to talk to voters in every state. This is how we'll win.

name: Joni Ernst
subject: Join Rob
body:
| Peter --

I was in Cleveland this morning for an amazing Women for Portman event with Rob, Jane, and so many supporters.

Rob Portman and I know how important his Senate race is this year. Rob is a tremendous leader for Ohio and our country -- he's been leading the fight to put a stop to the heroin epidemic, fighting for better jobs and a safer, more prosperous America.

[](http://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rob&n=1)
Rob's actually getting work done in Washington. Just this week, the Senate passed Rob's bill to tackle the heroin epidemic by improving drug prevention and treatment. Rob is the kind of Senator we need fighting for better jobs and a safer America.

National Democrats have circled the Buckeye State on the map. They know that Ohio could be the deciding state when it comes to who wins the White House and the Senate Majority. Ohio will have a clear choice in November. Rob is fighting for a brighter future for Ohio, but Ted Strickland wants to take Ohio back to the days when Ohio lost over 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation on his watch.

Rob and his campaign are working very hard to earn your vote. They've contacted over 1.3 million voters since May of last year, and the work has just begun. You can sign up to volunteer and join the team by **[clicking here](http://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rob&n=2 "Volunteer!").

[](http://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rob&n=3 "Volunteer!")**Ohio's primary is in just a few days and I hope we can count on you to vote for Rob on Tuesday and continue to work hard throughout the fall to make sure Ohio sends Rob Portman back to the Senate!

Sincerely, Senator Joni Ernst [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rob&n=4 "Donate Here!") [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rob&n=5)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rob&n=6)[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rob&n=7 "Donate Here!")

---

Patrick stopped by The Villages to talk about how he plans to address income inequality, strengthen Social Security, and make smart investments in infrastructure. | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2355/738133e4/34a211c3/7f83e36c/1483413031/VEsC/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160310")

### Straight from patrick
## SOCIAL SECURITY & MEDICARE
Despite the fact that they are successful, effective, and popular, Medicare and Social Security -- and the millions of seniors that rely on them -- are continually under threat from Republicans. Everyone I met at a Villages community center gets that we need to protect Social Security and Medicare. They know that our nation's elderly rely on Social Security and Medicare to stay out of poverty and provide a vital safety net. It's really sad Republicans in Congress don't seem to get it. Republicans are trying to weaken Social Security and Medicare. I won't let that happen. [**_Join me and sign on to strengthen Social Security and Medicare and protect seniors._**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2355/738133e4/34a211c3/7f83e36c/1483413031/VEsD/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160310") \-- Patrick

subject: $424,153 in new super PAC spending
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
We always expected the millionaires and billionaires backing the Clinton campaign would throw the kitchen sink at us ahead of this Tuesday's five big primaries.
Here it comes.
Just yesterday, the Clinton campaign's largest super PAC announced hundreds of thousands of dollars in new spending in Missouri, Illinois, and Ohio. And there's more coming. **That brings the total spent supporting Hillary Clinton 's campaign to more than $10 million from this group alone!**
There are only four days before the critical elections on Tuesday, and we're approaching the last chance for you to contribute and have it go towards the upcoming primaries. Bernie needs you today:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign and send a message that you have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class trying to buy this election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pacs-spending?refcode=em160311-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pacs-spending?refcode=em160311-full")
Five large, delegate-rich states in just four days. We're down a bit in each of them, but like we proved in Michigan, if people step up and come together in support of our campaign in the days before these primaries, there's nothing we cannot accomplish.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
